name: Wilderness of Temptation
oracleText:
Wilderness of Temptation enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
{2}, {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If a creature died this turn, scry 1.
flavorText: "Man shall not live by bread alone." — Matthew 4:4
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Jesus Tempted in the Wilderness" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Jesus Tempted in the Wilderness
classics.sourceNotes: This is the most direct classic wilderness temptation match in the batch.
